## Why CCQA, not somewhere else

<!--
CCQA's scope is "drive a coder agent through an LLM-described test
flow, read-only, against a git checkout". Features that fit:
- new coder adapter, new prompt, new flow node kind, new UI affordance
Features that probably don't:
- a generic CI runner, a code formatter, a vulnerability scanner
